ogTitle: Leslie Dam vs Lethebrook: Climate Safety

heading: Leslie Dam vs Lethebrook — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Leslie Dam, Queensland and Lethebrook, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Lethebrook has a lower overall climate risk score (28/100) compared to Leslie Dam (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Leslie Dam or Lethebrook safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Leslie Dam has a flood risk score of 56/100, while Lethebrook scores 23/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Leslie Dam scores 24/100 for bushfire risk. Lethebrook scores 31/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Leslie Dam or Lethebrook?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Lethebrook has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.35% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
